name: Pine Hall Elementary School
description: Come play pickleball at Pine Hall Elementary School in Pine Hall, NC! There is 1 indoor court. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The court is private.

name: Stokes Family YMCA
description: Stokes Family YMCA is a place to play pickleball in King, NC. There are 3 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water. The courts can be reserved. A membership is required to play.
